name: zephyr-mf-transfers-app-demo
description: Rsbuild Module Federation example with Zephyr

scripts.build: pnpm build-shared-ui && pnpm build-transfers && pnpm build-balances && pnpm build-reports && pnpm build-ledger && pnpm build-settings && pnpm build-consumer
scripts.dev-apps: pnpm --filter=transfers-app dev & pnpm --filter=balances-app dev & pnpm --filter=reports-app dev & pnpm --filter=ledger-app dev & pnpm --filter=settings-app dev & pnpm --filter=consumer-shell dev
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter=shared-ui-app dev & pnpm --filter=transfers-app dev & pnpm --filter=balances-app dev & pnpm --filter=reports-app dev & pnpm --filter=ledger-app dev & pnpm --filter=settings-app dev & pnpm --filter=consumer-shell dev
